old_column.content: description: Used to select and upload files from their device.

new_column.content: description: Used to select and upload files from their device.

old_column.content: The `FileUpload` component also provides a set of shortcuts for common use

new_column.content: The `FileUpload` component also provides a set of shortcuts for common use

old_column.content: By default, the `FileUploadItems` shortcut renders the list of uploaded files.

new_column.content: By default, the `FileUploadItems` shortcut renders the list of uploaded files.
